title: Plan Android SSH tablet client MVP
description: Define and track the MVP needed to build an Android tablet SSH client with tabbed sessions similar to Windows Terminal, including machine profiles, SSH key management, and startup workspaces that can open multiple sessions automatically.
acceptance_criteria: A parent issue exists for the MVP scope. Child tasks cover app shell, SSH transport, terminal rendering, machine profiles, key generation and import, startup tab groups, secure storage, and quality gates.

title: Set up Android project foundation and app architecture
description: Create the Android application foundation, choose the UI stack, define module structure, and establish the architecture for connection and session state.
acceptance_criteria: Project builds on a current Android toolchain. Architecture decisions are documented in the issue. Core app shell and dependency setup are ready for feature work.
notes: Installed a repo-local JDK 17, Android SDK, and Gradle wrapper under .tools, added build documentation in README.md, and verified the project with ./gradlew assembleDebug and ./gradlew test using the local toolchain.

title: Support saved machine groups that open multiple tabs on launch
description: Allow users to define a named group of machine profiles and automatically open all of them as separate tabs when the app starts.
acceptance_criteria: A user can save a launch group made of multiple machine profiles, mark one as the default startup group, and open all tabs in one action or at app launch. Each tab shows a clear machine label so a six-machine daily workflow is easy to track.
notes: Implemented saved launch-group creation, startup-default selection, and workspace activation so multiple machine tabs open together from saved profiles.

title: Build tabbed session workspace for tablet layouts
description: Implement the main workspace UI with a tab strip, active session switching, and tablet-focused layouts inspired by Windows Terminal behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Users can open, switch, rename, and close tabs from the workspace. The layout works in landscape and portrait tablet sizes. Empty and loading states are defined.

title: Implement SSH connection flow and machine profile models
description: Add connection models and the flow for creating, editing, and launching SSH connections, including reusable machine profiles, credentials, and host metadata.
acceptance_criteria: A user can define a machine profile and start a connection attempt from the UI. Validation covers host, port, user, and auth mode. Profile metadata is exposed clearly so each tab shows which machine it belongs to.
notes: Fixed bootstrap failure 'No such algorithm X25519 for provider BC' by configuring SSHJ with a compatibility key-exchange set that excludes curve25519/x25519 KEX algorithms during onboarding connections.

title: Integrate terminal emulator rendering and input pipeline
description: Integrate a terminal rendering component that can display remote shell output and handle keyboard, paste, and control input correctly on Android.
acceptance_criteria: The app renders terminal output with scrolling and text selection support where available. Hardware and soft keyboard input reach the remote shell. Basic terminal sizing and resize handling are implemented.

title: Add multi-session lifecycle, startup workspaces, and tab persistence
description: Manage concurrent SSH sessions, reconnect behavior, startup workspaces, and restoration of tab metadata so the app can launch a predefined set of machine sessions together.
acceptance_criteria: Multiple sessions can stay active independently. A user can define a startup workspace that opens several saved machine profiles at once, including a daily set such as six hosts. Tab state survives configuration changes and disconnected sessions are handled safely.

title: Securely store machine profiles, keys, and user preferences
description: Design secure storage for saved machine profiles, generated or imported SSH keys, and preferences using Android-appropriate encryption and platform APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Saved machine profiles persist locally. Sensitive material is stored using secure platform-backed mechanisms or a documented safe alternative. Preferences for terminal behavior and appearance are persisted and available to startup workspaces.

title: Polish tablet ergonomics and connection UX
description: Improve usability for tablet workflows, including touch targets, external keyboard support, gestures, and status feedback around connection events.
acceptance_criteria: The UI supports common tablet interactions cleanly. External keyboard shortcuts and focus behavior are specified. Connection, error, and reconnect states are understandable to the user.

title: Add validation, test coverage, and release readiness checks
description: Define the quality gates for the project, including unit or UI tests, build verification, and a release checklist for the MVP.
acceptance_criteria: Test targets and build commands are documented and runnable. Core session and connection flows have automated coverage where practical. A release checklist exists for shipping the MVP.

title: Build SSH key generation and import management
description: Implement key management so users can generate SSH key pairs with different algorithms and sizes, import existing keys, and assign them to machine profiles.
acceptance_criteria: The app supports generating new key pairs for the selected algorithms and supported key sizes or curves. Users can import an existing private key and matching public key where needed. Generated and imported keys can be selected from machine profiles without exposing secret material in plain text.
notes: Kept manual ssh-copy-id command copy for troubleshooting, but primary path now performs automated key installation + reconnect validation to avoid prior post-copy connect failures.
